title: AN ACT TO AMEND PROJECT NUMBERED D-143.2, FOR THE PROVINCE OF AKLAN, PAGE 928-A, TITLE D, APPENDIX A OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3064 / 57 OG No. 6, 1014 (February 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2787, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND PROJECT NUMBERED D-143.2, FOR THE PROVINCE OF AKLAN, PAGE 928-A, TITLE D, APPENDIX A OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Project numbered D-143.2, for the Province of Aklan, page 928-A, Title D, Appendix A of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"D-143.2

Aklan Waterworks, for the towns of Makato, Kalibo, Banga, New Washington, Lezo, Malinao, Numancia and Tangalan.

GOB

(200)

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
